d: Seth flashes toward an enemy, dealing [[100%]]<ATK> damage 3 times, then freezes them briefly and jumps to deal [[150%]]<ATK> more damage to the target. Seth becomes [[invincible]] and recovers HP equal to [[25%]] of the total damage dealt during this skill. Seth prioritizes selecting the [[weakest]] enemy as the target.
Increases HP recovery from each Bloodlust stack to [[15%]] of the total damage dealt.
Seth pounces on the [[weakest]] enemy in range and deals [[150%]]<ATK> damage plus [[25%]] of the target's lost HP. The additional damage cannot exceed [[400%]] of his ATK.

Seth gains a stack of Bloodlust when the HP of a non-summoned enemy first falls below [[33%]], up to [[3]] stacks. Each stack permanently increases his Haste by [[10]] and Life Drain by [[7]]. Seth gains [[25%]] Phys and Magic DEF when he first triggers Bloodlust.
Gains a stack of Bloodlust when the HP of a non-summoned enemy first falls below [[50%]].
Increases Haste by [[12]] and Life Drain by [[10]] permanently with each stack of Bloodlust.
Gains [[25]] Crit when he first triggers Bloodlust.
Seth immediately resets the cooldown of Predator's Lunge and recovers [[200]] Energy when a non-summoned enemy is defeated.
Increases damage of Predator's Lunge by an extra [[15%]] for each casting, up to [[5]] stacks.
Seth reduces the target's Phys DEF by an extra [[15%]] for [[6]]s per stack of Bloodlust if he already carries Bloodlust when casting Predator's Lunge.
